title: Why the Rich Get Richer

segments.text: The rich get richer because their money makes money.
And it starts smaller than you think.
A little invested early beats a fortune invested late.
This is the quiet power of compounding over time.
Time in the game beats trying to time the game.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: The rich let compounding do the work — time beats timing. Follow for daily money wisdom!
